allow: Bash(ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration,bit_rate -show_entries stream=codec_name,sample_rate,channels -of default=noprint_wrappers=1 "artifacts/guion_historia/Mecanismo de Anticitera.m4a")
Bash(ffmpeg -v error -i "artifacts/guion_historia/Mecanismo de Anticitera.m4a" -af volumedetect -f null -)

Bash(ffmpeg -y -v error -i "artifacts/guion_historia/Mecanismo de Anticitera.m4a" -af "highpass=f=80,afftdn=nf=-25,acompressor=threshold=-18dB:ratio=3:attack=5:release=50,loudnorm=I=-16:TP=-1.5:LRA=11" -c:a pcm_s16le -ar 16000 -ac 1 artifacts/guion_historia.wav)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\Documents\\Grabaciones de sonido" | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 3 Name, LastWriteTime, Length)

PowerShell(ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration -of csv=p=0 "$env:USERPROFILE\\Documents\\Grabaciones de sonido\\anticitera.m4a"; ffmpeg -i "$env:USERPROFILE\\Documents\\Grabaciones de sonido\\anticitera.m4a" -af volumedetect -f null - 2>&1 | Select-String "mean_volume|max_volume"; ffmpeg -i "$env:USERPROFILE\\Documents\\Grabaciones de sonido\\anticitera.m4a" -af "silencedetect=noise=-35dB:d=0.4" -f null - 2>&1 | Select-String "silence_start|silence_end" | Select-Object -First 4; ffmpeg -i "$env:USERPROFILE\\Documents\\Grabaciones de sonido\\anticitera.m4a" -af "silencedetect=noise=-35dB:d=0.4" -f null - 2>&1 | Select-String "silence_start|silence_end" | Select-Object -Last 2)

PowerShell(ffmpeg -i "$env:USERPROFILE\\Documents\\Grabaciones de sonido\\anticitera.m4a" -af "astats=measure_perchannel=Peak_count+Flat_factor+Peak_level:measure_overall=none" -f null - 2>&1 | Select-String "Peak count|Flat factor|Peak level")

PowerShell(ffmpeg -y -v error -ss 1.55 -to 51.4 -i "$env:USERPROFILE\\Documents\\Grabaciones de sonido\\anticitera.m4a" -af "highpass=f=80,aresample=48000,arnndn=m=artifacts/bd.rnnn,acompressor=threshold=-18dB:ratio=3:attack=5:release=50,volume=10dB,alimiter=limit=0.87:level=false" -c:a pcm_s16le -ar 16000 -ac 1 artifacts/guion_v2_final.wav; "--- nivel:"; ffmpeg -i artifacts/guion_v2_final.wav -af volumedetect -f null - 2>&1 | Select-String "mean_volume|max_volume"; "--- piso de ruido:"; ffmpeg -i artifacts/guion_v2_final.wav -af astats=measure_overall=Noise_floor:measure_perchannel=none -f null - 2>&1 | Select-String "Noise floor dB"; ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration -of csv=p=0 artifacts/guion_v2_final.wav)

PowerShell(python -m pipeline.animado --audio artifacts/guion_v2_final.wav --guion artifacts/guion_historia_v2.txt --prompts-file artifacts/prompts_historia_v2.json --autorizacion original --evidencia "Guion y voz propios \(contenido original v2\)" --estilo historico --modelo medium --semilla 7 --stub-visual)

PowerShell(curl.exe -sL -o artifacts/musica_lightless_dawn.mp3 "https://incompetech.com/music/royalty-free/mp3-royaltyfree/Lightless%20Dawn.mp3"; if \(Test-Path artifacts/musica_lightless_dawn.mp3\) { $f = Get-Item artifacts/musica_lightless_dawn.mp3; "$\($f.Length\) bytes"; ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration,format_name -of csv=p=0 artifacts/musica_lightless_dawn.mp3 })
PowerShell(ffprobe -v error -select_streams v:0 -show_entries stream=width,height -of csv=p=0 artifacts/short_v2.mp4)

PowerShell(ffmpeg -y -v error -i artifacts/short_v2.mp4 -ss 12 -i artifacts/musica_lightless_dawn.mp3 -filter_complex "[1:a]volume=0.12,afade=t=in:d=1.5,afade=t=out:st=47.4:d=2.4[m];[0:a][m]amix=inputs=2:duration=first:normalize=0[a]" -map 0:v -map "[a]" -c:v copy -c:a aac -b:a 192k artifacts/short_v2_musica.mp4)
Bash(ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration -of default=noprint_wrappers=1:nokey=1 "/c/Users/Fabian/Documents/Grabaciones de sonido/telegrafo.m4a")
